fieldValues.value: Text Projection normalization is NFC then Unicode simple lowercasing

Normalization applied during content-match comparison MUST consist of NFC Unicode normalization followed by Unicode simple lowercasing (not full/locale-specific casing). Implementations MUST NOT strip punctuation, diacritics, or whitespace during normalization. Additional stemming or tokenization is permitted for ranking but MUST NOT affect the guaranteed-recall-floor computation.
